notes: v342 — TOP 20 PANEL NOW FITS ALL TWENTY, AND THE TABLE COLOUR SEAM IS FIXED. (1) The 🏆 Top 20 to Watch panel used to show only about four shares in a tall single column, and going full screen just added empty space at the sides. It's been rebuilt as a neat grid of compact cards that flow into as many columns as the width allows, and it now opens wide by default — so you see all twenty at once without scrolling, and full screen genuinely uses the whole screen (several columns). Everything's still there per card: rank, code, score /10, the bar, the breakdown, the ☆ and the band. (2) You spotted the table showing two different background shades — the frozen Ticker/Name column on the left was a darker navy than the columns on the right. That column was hard-coded to the darkest shade while the rest was see-through. Fixed: the whole table is now one consistent shade, so it reads as a single clean surface with no seam down the middle. Hard-refresh to load v342. ALSO RECENT — v341 — checked the maths (sound) and upgraded RSI to the standard Wilder method. ALSO RECENT — v340 — the 📊 Range column is back. ALSO RECENT — v339 — Undo now sticks. (Older notes live in the Owner's Manual changelog.)
